reviews.review_description:
Pretty sweet virtual platform to experience Burning Man in various ways! Lots of (video) content that draws from the rich culture from years past, it's amazing to experience iconic creative works in the here and now, from the comfort of your own space! ✌️😎👍 

Note: if you are on (OG Oculus) Quest 2, the app may have difficulty loading the starter area (and crash).  To avoid this, look down at the ground while the world is loading. 

I suspect the engine is trying to draw too much at the same time, which may only work on Quest 3+ headsets. And by looking down, you're delaying some objects from rendering, which gives more breathing room.

reviews.review_title: Best art car ride in years
reviews.review_description: From my couch at home I experienced 360  ride on an art car at burning man . Thank you .

When an event is going on or when you are with friends, such a blast to go on a playa crawl, see art, and learn about it. Even alone its fascinating to try and find all the worlds. Total rabbit hole of discovery. Love it!

I’m the first reviewer here. So far cool app.
- simulations
